## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Plugin improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commit format (`type(scope): message`)
- [ ] Plugin validates: `claude plugin validate <plugin-path>`
- [ ] README updated (if adding/changing plugins)
- [ ] SKILL.md has description under 120 characters (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths in SKILL.md
- [ ] Tested with `claude plugin install` locally
